text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Yard Maintenance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ANTFARM COMMUNITYCONNECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with yard maintenance tasks such as weeding, clearing gutters, planting, raking, and other services. 39140 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Older adults and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 668-7962 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ANTFARM COMMUNITYCONNECT
